Destinations

Choose the country that gives your Africa trip the right shape.

Search by destination or filter by region to compare travel styles, access, seasonality, attractions, stays, restaurants, and booking options.

Image slot Country Uganda

East Africa

Uganda

Uganda is one of Africa’s best-value wildlife countries, blending gorilla trekking, chimpanzee tracking, Nile landscapes, and savannah safari parks into one route.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Kenya

East Africa

Kenya

Kenya remains the clearest first-time safari gateway thanks to strong guide networks, the Maasai Mara, private conservancies, and smooth access from Nairobi.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Tanzania

East Africa

Tanzania

Tanzania delivers some of Africa’s most cinematic safari landscapes, from Serengeti migration scenes to the Ngorongoro Crater and Zanzibar’s coast.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Rwanda

East Africa

Rwanda

Rwanda offers a premium, compact travel experience with gorilla trekking, polished logistics, and Kigali as one of Africa’s easiest arrival cities.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Ethiopia

East Africa

Ethiopia

Ethiopia appeals to travelers seeking history, ancient religious sites, mountain scenery, and a very different East African experience from safari-led routes.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Ghana

West Africa

Ghana

Ghana is one of West Africa’s easiest entry points, combining strong hospitality, heritage travel, Atlantic coast sites, and a vibrant contemporary cultural scene.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Senegal

West Africa

Senegal

Senegal offers one of the region’s most polished cultural travel experiences, balancing Dakar’s urban energy with coastal heritage and softer delta landscapes.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Benin

West Africa

Benin

Benin is small but rich in heritage, especially for travelers interested in Ouidah, Ganvié, royal history, and the living traditions of Vodun culture.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Sierra Leone

West Africa

Sierra Leone

Sierra Leone is an emerging leisure destination known for uncrowded beaches, warm hospitality, and a still-lightly-developed coastline.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Cabo Verde

West Africa

Cabo Verde

Cabo Verde combines island leisure, winter sun, water sports, and relatively easy resort logistics for travelers who want a lighter Atlantic break.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country South Africa

Southern Africa

South Africa

South Africa is the region’s most varied travel gateway, offering city design, wine, beaches, and major safari access within one country.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Botswana

Southern Africa

Botswana

Botswana is a high-value safari market built around the Okavango Delta, Chobe, and low-impact conservation-led travel.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Namibia

Southern Africa

Namibia

Namibia is one of Africa’s strongest road-trip countries, defined by desert scale, low-density landscapes, and exceptional scenery.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Zimbabwe

Southern Africa

Zimbabwe

Zimbabwe delivers Victoria Falls, Hwange, and some of Africa’s strongest guiding traditions in a more lightly crowded setting.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Zambia

Southern Africa

Zambia

Zambia is revered for walking safaris, strong wildlife density, and a rugged sense of authenticity on the Zambezi and Luangwa systems.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Morocco

Northern Africa

Morocco

Morocco remains one of Africa’s easiest culture-forward destinations, blending medinas, design hotels, mountain routes, Atlantic surf, and desert camps.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Egypt

Northern Africa

Egypt

Egypt delivers some of the world’s most iconic heritage travel, from Cairo and Giza to Nile cities and Red Sea resorts.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Tunisia

Northern Africa

Tunisia

Tunisia combines Mediterranean resort ease with Roman ruins, medinas, and Sahara-edge routes at a relatively accessible price point.

Destination country
View Details
Image slot Country Algeria

Northern Africa

Algeria

Algeria remains under-visited compared with its neighbors, but it offers major Saharan and archaeological rewards for travelers seeking a less conventional North Africa route.

Destination country
View Details

Africa travel listings, destination insight, stays, restaurants, and partner booking paths for better-planned journeys.

Use each guide to understand the destination, compare nearby stays and restaurants, and follow through to trusted external booking pages when the fit feels right.
